candidate_problems.text: What specific architectural mechanisms can implement conjecture-and-criticism in an LLM-based system such that they eliminate errors rather than merely re-rank outputs for plausibility?
Can an LLM-based system improve the space of future conjectures through retained criticism without human intervention, and under what measurable conditions would that count as knowledge creation?
Are there domains where token prediction alone, without explicit rival-generation and criticism modules, nevertheless yields genuinely hard-to-vary explanations?
